Dilin Nair, better known by his stage name Raftaar, is an Indian rapper, lyricist, music producer, composer, dancer, actor and TV personality associated with Hindi, Punjabi and Haryanvi music.
Ankit Singh Patyal, better known by his stage names Ikka and Ikka Singh, is an Indian rapper and lyricist.
